title: To withstand coastal weather conditions, use WeatherPrufe
bodyText:
Sponsored Content
                            Video

BUSINESS NEWS AND VIDEO - WeatherPrufe Paints is a privately- and fully South African-owned paint and waterproofing manufacturer in Cape Town and the Western Cape, with a shop in George.


> It services the whole Garden Route area and is the top paint shop for coastal home owners.


WeatherPrufe produces a comprehensive range of products, formulated to provide solutions to commonly encountered coating problems.

They pride themselves in the technical integrity of their products and are committed to the maintenance of the standard set by these products.

Quality products, strong technical service, honest and accurate advice, along with an eagerness to exceed customers’ expectations, have been the formula for the success enjoyed by WeatherPrufe to date.


> VIDEO - WeatherPrufe Paints:


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

On surfaces where many of the traditional waterproofing systems have failed, WeatherPrufe Paints, with Elastocryl pure acrylic systems with full membrane, have become the top system for the long-term waterproofing of concrete roofs, parapet walls and the areas around windows, as well as underground waterproofing.

Elastocryl is applied by hand and provides an optimal protective layer that is sun and water resistant and will provide many years of excellent protection.

Several of the best building and painting contractors in the area have been using WeatherPrufe products for years, with great success.

ProvenElastocryl has been proven in the industry as an excellent alternative for "torch on" waterproofing and can even be used in fish ponds.

WeatherPrufe paints are manufactured specifically for coastal conditions and provide the very best protection against the elements and moisture. They provide coastal homeowners with the best waterproofing acrylic product around, offering high quality, hassle-free paint, with a factory guarantee of up to 10 years.

WeatherPrufe Paints produces a comprehensive range of products, formulated to provide solutions to commonly encountered coating problems.Its paints are the best and offer the best value for money. It prides itself in the technical integrity of its products.

WeatherPrufe has been setting the example and has been leading the way, supplying paint for large housing complexes in Mossel Bay and surrounding areas for many years.


> Call David Wandrag (082 977 7802) at WeatherPrufe Southern Cape and Garden Route for a free quotation today.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
